title: World of pets Dog Lead Approx 120cm Bright Colour Pet Dog Puppy Walking
features: Adjustable Length: Perfect for dogs of various sizes, this lead extends up to 120 cm for easy handling and control during walks
Lightweight & Portable: Crafted for convenience, this lead is incredibly light, making it easy to carry around and ideal for outdoor use
Versatile Usage: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, this lead is perfect for training and exercise, helping your dog stay active and engaged
Durable & Water-Resistant: Built to last, this lead is water-repellent, ensuring it stays functional even in harsh weather conditions
Ideal for Medium to Large Dogs: Designed with medium to large breeds in mind, this lead is perfect for dogs that require a bit more control during walks
description: Introducing the World of Pets Dog Lead, a vibrant and practical accessory for your furry companion. Measuring approximately 120cm in length, this lightweight and portable lead is perfect for outdoor and indoor use, making it ideal for walks, exercise, and training. Suitable for medium to large dogs, it's designed with a focus on durability and ease of use. Keep your pet safe and stylish with this unscented, water-repellent dog lead.
